notes: Full dinner menu captured including appetizers, soups/salads, Indian mains, vegetarian mains, tandoori, breads, beverages, desserts, and sides. No alcohol/wine list present on this menu. Lunch and Party/Catering Tray sections were not included in the raw text.

dishes.name: Garlic Naan (Featured)
dishes.description: Leavened bread topped with garlic

dishes.name: Butter Massala (Featured)
dishes.description: A deliciously smooth butter, tomato, and cream sauce, spiced with ginger and garlic. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Tikka Masala (Featured)
dishes.description: A cream based curry cooked with ginger and cilantro in a tomato sauce. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Samosa
dishes.description: Two crispy pastries filled with your choice of freshly mixed vegetables or delicately spiced lean ground beef.

dishes.name: Vegetable Cutlets
dishes.description: A medley of vegetables, herbs & spices formed into patties and sautéed served with cilantro and tamarind chutneys.

dishes.name: Pakoras
dishes.description: Delicately spiced fried fritters lightly battered in chickpea flour. Served with cilantro and tamarind chutneys.

dishes.name: Hummus
dishes.description: The original middle eastern dip of garbanzo beans, tahini sauce and a special dressing served with soft pita bread. (Pita not vegan).

dishes.name: Baba Ghanooj
dishes.description: Eggplant smoked on an open fire, pureed and mixed with tahini sauce and our own special dressing. Served with soft pita bread. (Pita not vegan).

dishes.name: Grape Leaves
dishes.description: Vine ripened grape leaves stuffed with seasoned rice, onions and delicate spices. Served with cilantro and tamarind chutneys.

dishes.name: Paneer Tikka
dishes.description: Tender pieces of cheese marinated in yogurt, ginger garlic, herbs and spices. Served on a bed of lettuce with cilantro and tamarind chutneys.

dishes.name: Vegetarian Delight
dishes.description: A selection of vegetable samosa, vegetable pakora, aloo pakora, paneer pakora, and vegetable cutlet. Served with cilantro and tamarind chutneys.

dishes.name: Chicken Tikka (Appetizer)
dishes.description: Boneless chicken marinated in yogurt, herbs and spices. Served on a bed of lettuce with cilantro and tamarind chutneys.

dishes.name: Fish Tikka (Appetizer)
dishes.description: Juicy pieces of fresh fish marinated with spices and roasted in the tandoor oven. Accompanied with our special cilantro and tamarind chutney.

dishes.name: Chicken Wings
dishes.description: Fresh chicken wings roasted in the tandoor oven. Served with tamarind and cilantro chutneys.

dishes.name: Taste of India Delight
dishes.description: A selection of vegetable samosa, vegetable pakora, chicken tikka and chicken pakoras, served with cilantro and tamarind chutneys.

dishes.name: House Salad
dishes.description: Fresh garden greens, lettuce, tomatoes, black olives, carrots, bell peppers, mushrooms and cucumbers served with Mediterranean dressing.

dishes.name: Mediterranean Salad
dishes.description: Fresh garden salad made with lettuce, tomatoes, green olives, carrot, bell peppers, mushrooms, cucumbers and feta cheese. Served with Mediterranean dressing.

dishes.name: Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Fresh romaine lettuce prepared with a classic Caesar dressing and croutons.

dishes.name: Indian Salad
dishes.description: Onions, tomatoes, cucumbers, and green bell peppers mixed in a tangy sauce.

dishes.name: Dal Soup
dishes.description: Homemade lentil soup prepared in an old Indian tradition.

dishes.name: Tomato Soup
dishes.description: A rich curried tomato soup spiced with cumin and curry leaves with a touch of cream.

dishes.name: Mulligatawny Soup
dishes.description: A rich chicken and lentil soup, flavored with Indian spices.

dishes.name: Butter Massala
dishes.description: A deliciously smooth butter, tomato, and cream sauce, spiced with ginger and garlic. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Chili Chicken
dishes.description: A famous dish from Delhi: chicken stir-fried in green onions, bell peppers, ginger and other spices. Served with basmati rice. (No Dairy)

dishes.name: Coconut Curry
dishes.description: Rich curry cooked with coconut milk, cream, ginger, garlic and our special blend of spices. Served with basmati rice. Vegan option available if no dairy selected.

dishes.name: Curry
dishes.description: A traditional brown curry prepared with tomatoes, onions and fresh herbs. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Egg Curry
dishes.description: Egg cooked in a traditional curry sauce. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Jaipuri Masala
dishes.description: An exquisite dish from the city of Jaipur prepared with tomatoes, onion, ginger, garlic, and paneer. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Jalfrezi
dishes.description: Boneless meat or vegetables stir-fried in brown curry with bell peppers, garlic, ginger, tomatoes, and onions. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Karai Ghost
dishes.description: Cooked in a traditional Indian wok with onions, tomatoes, fenugreek leaves, capsicums, fresh ginger, and garlic. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Madras Chile Massala
dishes.description: This dish originates from the city of Madras. Cooked in a sauce of tomatoes, roasted dry chilies, browned garlic, cumin and other authentic Indian spices. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Mango Curry
dishes.description: Tender pieces of meat or vegetables sautéed with major grey mango chutney and a touch of cream. Served with basmati rice. Vegan option available.

dishes.name: Palak Massala (Saag)
dishes.description: Cream of spinach simmered with onions and spices. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Pineapple Curry
dishes.description: Our house curry with chunks of cut pineapples, spices and cream. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Rogan Josh
dishes.description: This famous dish from Kashmir is cooked with tomatoes and onions then roasted with spices in a rich brown curry sauce. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Royal Biryani
dishes.description: A classic Mughlai dish of basmati rice cooked with curry raisins, cashew nuts, sautéed onions, and saffron. Served with raita.

dishes.name: Shai Korma
dishes.description: A traditional dish prepared with exotic spices, herbs and a cream-based sauce with almonds. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Tikka Masala
dishes.description: A cream based curry cooked with ginger and cilantro in a tomato sauce. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Vindaloo
dishes.description: Zesty curry cooked in a tangy sauce of wine vinegar, ginger, and potatoes. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Aloo Gobi
dishes.description: Potatoes and cauliflower sautéed with onions and fresh herbs. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Aloo Mutter Mushroom
dishes.description: Potatoes, green peas and mushrooms in an onion curry sauce with ginger. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Baigan Bharta
dishes.description: Eggplant baked over an open flame, mashed and seasoned with herbs, sautéed onions, green peas and tomatoes. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Chana Massala
dishes.description: Chickpeas cooked over a slow fire blended with spices and tomatoes. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Dal Maharani
dishes.description: Creamed lentils cooked with select herbs and spices. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Mutter Massala
dishes.description: Fresh green peas cooked in a golden curry sauce. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Okra Massala
dishes.description: Okra cooked with sautéed onion, tomatoes, special herbs and spices. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Paneer Shahi
dishes.description: Cubes of mild, homemade Indian cheese cooked in a smooth masala cream sauce. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Tadka Dal
dishes.description: Yellow lentils cooked with tomatoes, onions, garlic, ginger and fresh herbs and spices. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Vegetable Kofta
dishes.description: Pureed vegetables and cheese kofta served in a butter sauce. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Navratan Korma
dishes.description: Vegetables with cashews, paneer cheese, simmered in a tomato-cream sauce. Navratan means 'nine gems', referring to the nine ingredients in this dish. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Shimla Paneer
dishes.description: Our special paneer dish consisting of bell peppers, onions, tomatoes, mushrooms and a blend of unique spices. Served with basmati rice.

dishes.name: Chicken Tikka (Tandoori)
dishes.description: Succulent pieces of boneless chicken rubbed with Indian herbs and spices and marinated with yogurt served with sliced onions and lemon. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables.

dishes.name: Keema Kabab
dishes.description: Seasoned ground lamb marinated with fresh herbs and lemon. Served with sliced onions and lemon. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables. Halal.

dishes.name: Lamb Boti Kabab
dishes.description: Tender pieces of New Zealand lamb marinated in yogurt with our special blend of Indian spices. Served with lemon and onions. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables. Halal.

dishes.name: Shish Taouk
dishes.description: Cubed chicken marinated in yogurt, garlic, oregano, saffron & other middle eastern spices. Served on a bed of rice & fresh vegetables.

dishes.name: Tandoori Breast
dishes.description: Juicy spring boneless chicken breast marinated with yogurt, fresh ground spices. Served with sliced onions and lemon. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables. Halal.

dishes.name: Tandoori Chicken
dishes.description: Juicy spring bone-in chicken marinated with yogurt with flavorful, fresh ground spices. Served with sliced onions and lemon. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables. Halal.

dishes.name: Tandoori Cod
dishes.description: Filet of cod marinated and cooked in the tandoor. Served with rice, vegetables, and lemon. No dairy in marinade.

dishes.name: Tandoori Paneer
dishes.description: Soft, juicy chunks of paneer marinated in tandoori masala and then grilled with vegetables. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables.

dishes.name: Tandoori Prawns
dishes.description: Jumbo prawns marinated in a special blend of spices and herbs then roasted in the tandoor served with sliced onions, lemon and bell pepper. No dairy in marinade.

dishes.name: Tandoori Salmon
dishes.description: Fresh king salmon cooked in our special tandoori marinade. Served with lemon and onions. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables. No dairy in marinade.

dishes.name: Tandoori Surprise
dishes.description: An assortment of tandoori specialties: chicken, lamb, beef, fish, and prawn. Served with sliced onions and lemon. Served with rice and sautéed vegetables.

dishes.description: Unleavened layered whole wheat bread. Vegan if no oil/butter option selected.

dishes.name: Keema Naan

dishes.name: Baklava

dishes.description: Specially prepared mango and pistachio ice cream.

dishes.description: Specially prepared coconut and almond ice cream.

dishes.description: Mango sorbet made locally.

dishes.description: Side of sweet mango chutney.

dishes.description: Homemade yoghurt.
